summary.text: The question is: "How to treat acne scars in Katy TX". This is about treating acne scars, localized to Katy, Texas. They want local options like dermatologists, clinics, or treatments available there....

action.query: best dermatologists for acne scars in Katy Texas
laser treatment acne scars Katy TX clinics

content.text:
**Treating acne scars in Katy, TX, typically involves consulting a board-certified dermatologist or medical spa for personalized options, as results depend on scar type (e.g., ice pick, boxcar, rolling, or hypertrophic), skin tone, and severity.** Self-treatment is not recommended, as improper approaches can worsen scarring or cause pigmentation issues.[[1]](https://www.dermofkaty.com/)[[2]](https://www.dermofkaty.com/scars/keloids/)

### General Treatment Approaches
Common evidence-based treatments include:
- **Topical therapies**: Retinoids, vitamin C serums, silicone gels, or prescription creams to improve texture and discoloration.
- **Minimally invasive procedures**: Microneedling (e.g., SkinPen) to stimulate collagen; chemical peels (including TCA Cross for deep scars); microneedling with PRP.
- **Laser and energy-based treatments**: Fractional CO2 lasers, IPL, Aerolase, or other resurfacing lasers to reduce scars, redness, and uneven tone.[[3]](https://htownaesthetics.com/skinpen-microneedling-in-texas/)[[4]](https://oasislasermedspa.com/)
- **Other options**: Subcision, fillers, acne surgery/excision for severe cases, or scar revision.[[5]](https://www.avivaderm.com/katy/)

Multiple sessions are often needed, and sun protection is essential during/after treatment. Start with an evaluation to rule out active acne and create a plan.

### Local Providers and Clinics in Katy, TX
Katy has several dermatology practices and medspas offering these services:
- **Dermatology Associates of Katy** (23510 Kingsland Blvd, Suite 110) — Handles scars/keloids and general dermatology.[[2]](https://www.dermofkaty.com/scars/keloids/)[[1]](https://www.dermofkaty.com/)
- **Cinco Ranch Dermatology** — Acne scar prevention/treatment, chemical peels, and related services.[[6]](https://cincoderm.com/services)[[7]](https://cincoderm.com/)
- **Clear Dermatology** — Microneedling with PRP for acne scars and skin texture.[[8]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/)
- **Hibiscus Health** — AviClear laser, chemical peels, and microneedling for scar-free skin.[[9]](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/acne-treatment/)
- **Oasis Laser MedSpa** — CO2 laser resurfacing and IPL for scars and texture.[[4]](https://oasislasermedspa.com/)
- **MedSpa at Villagio** — TCA Cross peels and microneedling specifically for acne scars.[[10]](https://medspaatvillagio.com/)
- **H-Town Aesthetics** — SkinPen microneedling for acne scars and texture.[[3]](https://htownaesthetics.com/skinpen-microneedling-in-texas/)
- **Radwan Medical Clinic & Rejuvenation Advance Laser Center** (411 Park Grove Dr #610) — Scar reduction treatments and acne care.[[11]](https://radwancosmeticcenter.com/)
- **Texas Dermatology Specialists** — Advanced options for acne scars and cosmetic concerns.[[12]](https://texasdermatology.com/)
- **Village Dermatology** (Katy office at 23960 Katy Freeway, Suite 230) — Acne and scar management.[[13]](https://www.villagedermatologyhouston.com/acne)
- **Nikko Dermatology** (Katy location) — Scar revision, chemical peels, PRP, and microneedling.[[14]](https://drnikko.com/locations/katy-dermatology/)

**Yelp and review sites** often highlight medspas like Face to Face Spa, Glow Up MD Med Spa, Spotless Skin Spa, and Elite Dermatology & Plastic Surgery for acne scar removal.[[15]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Acne+Scar+Removal&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)[[15]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Acne+Scar+Removal&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)

### Next Steps
Search Zocdoc or similar for availability, or contact offices directly for consultations (many accept new patients). Check insurance for medical dermatology vs. cosmetic procedures. For the latest reviews or specifics, look up providers on Yelp or their websites. Always verify credentials and discuss expectations, downtime, and costs during your visit.
